titleStmt.title: Postcard from Tomás Ó hÓgáin to Piaras Béaslaí in February 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Tomás Ó hÓgáin

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Postcard from Tomás Ó hÓgáin to Piaras Béaslaí in February 1916 - very faded and difficult to read.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
90, Burleigh Rd, South,
Liverpool. 8adh Feabhra, 1916 A Chara Chóir, A dtaobh na cnuasachta bige Amhrán agat seal ó shoin - is dócha
go bhfuil said agat sáthach fada anois
le haghaidh a mbeidh léir-mheasta agat
as tabhartha ós chómhair éinne eile
go mbadh mhaith leat a dtasbáint dó.
Dá bhithin seo, badh mhaith liom má's
sé do thoil é, iad do sheoladh chugham.
An rud a theidheann ró fhada is
baoghlach go n-imthigheann sé as
chuimhne ar fad, agus níor mhaith
liom i gcor ar bith, iad do chailleamhaint
óir níl aon chóip díobh agam, as
Dá dtarlóchadh an scéal go bhféadfá
aon úsáid a dhéanadh díobh san
am le teacht - dar ndó beidh fhios
agat cá mbeidh siad. Tá súil agam go bhfuilir ar
fóghnamh, agus an saoghal ag eirghe
leat ar fheabhas — fan an
so. Do Chara Dílis Tomás Ó hÓgáin An Saoi, Piaras Béaslaoi,
24, Mountjoy St.
Dublin.
